description: A new Payment Processing Gateway is going live. To prevent alert fatigue from individual server alerts, the NOC Manager has provided an architecture specification at ~/Desktop/payment_gateway_bsm_spec.txt. Read the specification, add the four required devices to the OpManager inventory, and then group them into a new Business Service (not a standard Device Group) named 'Payment-Processing-Gateway'. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
